name: mslearn-copilot-agents
description: Local VS Code extension that registers MSLearn GitHub Copilot agents as chat participants, enabling @agent-name usage in VS Code Chat.

chatParticipants.name: mslearn-research
chatParticipants.description: Deep research agent for understanding codebases, documenting systems, and determining feature requirements.

chatParticipants.name: mslearn-planning
chatParticipants.description: Creates detailed implementation plans from research artifacts or feature descriptions.

chatParticipants.name: mslearn-implementation
chatParticipants.description: Implementation agent for writing code based on plans.

chatParticipants.name: mslearn-code-review
chatParticipants.description: Code review agent for analyzing code quality and standards.

chatParticipants.name: mslearn-test
chatParticipants.description: Testing agent for test strategy and generation.
